displayName: Impossible Travel - Sign-in from Multiple Geographic Locations
description: Flags successful Azure AD sign-ins from two different countries within 60 minutes. If the time between logins is too short to physically travel, it gets flagged. Could be a compromised account or a VPN worth investigating.
query:
let travelWindow = 60; // minutes
let excludedCountries = dynamic(["" ]); // add trusted VPN exit countries if needed
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1d)
| where ResultType == "0" // successful sign-ins only
| where isnotempty(Location)
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    UserPrincipalName,
    UserId,
    IPAddress,
    Location,
    CountryOrRegion = tostring(LocationDetails.countryOrRegion),
    City            = tostring(LocationDetails.city),
    Latitude        = toreal(GeoCoordinates.latitude),
    Longitude       = toreal(GeoCoordinates.longitude),
    AppDisplayName,
    DeviceDetail
| where CountryOrRegion !in (excludedCountries)
| sort by UserPrincipalName asc, TimeGenerated asc
| serialize
| extend
    PrevUser      = prev(UserPrincipalName, 1),
    PrevTime      = prev(TimeGenerated, 1),
    PrevCountry   = prev(CountryOrRegion, 1),
    PrevCity      = prev(City, 1),
    PrevIP        = prev(IPAddress, 1),
    PrevLat       = prev(Latitude, 1),
    PrevLon       = prev(Longitude, 1)
| where UserPrincipalName == PrevUser
| extend TimeDiffMinutes = datetime_diff('minute', TimeGenerated, PrevTime)
| where TimeDiffMinutes between (1 .. travelWindow)
| where CountryOrRegion != PrevCountry
// Approximate distance using Haversine-like comparison on lat/lon delta
| extend LatDelta = abs(Latitude - PrevLat), LonDelta = abs(Longitude - PrevLon)
| where LatDelta > 2 or LonDelta > 2 // filter same-region noise
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    UserPrincipalName,
    CurrentCountry  = CountryOrRegion,
    CurrentCity     = City,
    CurrentIP       = IPAddress,
    PreviousCountry = PrevCountry,
    PreviousCity    = PrevCity,
    PreviousIP      = PrevIP,
    TimeDiffMinutes,
    AppDisplayName
| extend AlertDetail = strcat("Sign-in from ", CurrentCountry, " (", CurrentCity, ") only ", TimeDiffMinutes, " minutes after sign-in from ", PreviousCountry, " (", PreviousCity, ")")

alertDetailsOverride.alertDisplayNameFormat: Impossible Travel: {{UserPrincipalName}} in {{PreviousCountry}} then {{CurrentCountry}} within {{TimeDiffMinutes}} min
